title: Mahur Fort
tagline: Mahur Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Mahurgad Fort (Marathi: माहूरगड) is a fort located 130 km (81 mi) from Nanded.
overview.description: Mahurgad Fort (Marathi: माहूरगड) is a fort located 130 km (81 mi) from Nanded. The fort is in Mahur taluka in Nanded district, of Maharashtra. It is a pilgrimage centre of great significance to Hindus. It is the seat of goddess Renukadevi which is a shrine of Shakta pitha.

topPlaces.name: Mahur, Maharashtra
topPlaces.description: Mahur or Mahurgad is a town and religious place in Nanded district of Maharashtra, India. Mahur is the birthplace of Hindu God Dattatreya.

items.note: Mahur or Mahurgad is a town and religious place in Nanded district of Maharashtra, India. Mahur is the birthplace of Hindu God Dattatreya.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mahur Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mahur Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mahur Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Nanded Airport (97 km) and the nearest railway station is Nagpur Junction (190 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mahur Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mahur Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mahur Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Mahur Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mahur Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mahur, Maharashtra.
